headline: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Was Supposed To End Cybersecurity: It Just Triggered The Sector's Best Rally On Record
summary: Cybersecurity stocks were called dead after Anthropic's Claude Mythos. Six weeks later, HACK, BUG and CIBR ETFs are at record highs.
